results.title: Dental amalgam — Wikipedia
results.judge_reason: Comprehensive source-domain reference covering gamma-1, gamma-2, mercury and Cu6Sn5 elimination - the exact source material the candidate analogizes from.

results.title: Eta Cu-Sn (Cu6Sn5) crystals in high-Cu dispersant amalgam (PubMed)
results.judge_reason: Directly addresses the Cu6Sn5 eta-phase that converts Sn and eliminates gamma-2 - the specific source mechanism for the weak-phase-replacement analogy.

results.title: High-Copper Amalgam — BDS Notes
results.judge_reason: Educational source on high-Cu amalgam properties relevant to the source-side mechanism but lacks detailed phase mechanics.

results.title: LOT Merging: Minimizing Feature Drift (2025/5)
results.judge_reason: Addresses feature drift in merging but does not distinguish strong/weak phases or use auxiliary phase-converter regularizers as proposed.

results.title: Catalyst: Novel Regularizer for Structured Pruning (2025/7)
results.judge_reason: Auxiliary regularizer concept is related but applied to pruning, not phase-typed merge weak-component replacement.

results.title: Model Merging Survey (2025/3)
results.judge_reason: General merging survey covering pruning and hybrid strategies but lacks phase-typed strong-vs-weak classification with auxiliary replacement.

results.title: Model Merging in Era of LLMs (2026/3)
results.judge_reason: Comprehensive merging taxonomy survey but does not cover the specific phase-decomposition with auxiliary phase-converter concept.

results.title: K-Merge: Online Continual Merging (2025/10)
results.judge_reason: Continual LoRA merging is tangentially related but does not address weak-phase replacement or perturbation stability classification.
